ordered_events.detail: Enters his Nukha reception room in riding dress, does not sit
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad enters in riding dress, dust on his boots

ordered_events.detail: Counts seven piles of ten gold coins onto the table
ordered_events.quote: counts seven piles of ten gold coins onto the table

ordered_events.detail: Sweeps the gold coins into his sleeve in one motion
ordered_events.quote: sweeps them into his sleeve in one motion

ordered_events.detail: Slaps Kirillov's bald pate and walks out of the room
ordered_events.quote: slaps Kirillov's bald pate with the flat of his hand

objects.detail: Folded, set on the table between the two men
Extended toward Hadji Murad, who refuses to take it
Seven piles of ten swept into his sleeve
Kirillov arrives carrying the satchel

counts.quote: seven piles of ten gold coins
seven piles of ten gold coins

ordered_events.detail: Two hooded spies enter Hadji Murad's quarters at dusk
ordered_events.quote: Two SPIES enter hooded

ordered_events.detail: Two road-dusted messengers report Shamil's watchers everywhere
ordered_events.quote: Two road-dusted messengers add that Shamil's watchers are on every road

ordered_events.detail: Slides a gold coin across the carpet to each man
ordered_events.quote: slides a gold coin across the carpet to each man

ordered_events.detail: Rises, prepares gear, orders Eldar to saddle two horses
ordered_events.quote: tells Eldar to saddle the bay and the second horse

objects.detail: One coin slid to each of the four visitors
On leather thong at throat, closed in his hand
Lifted down, folded once, set beside his sword
Set beside the folded saddle blanket

ordered_events.detail: Cossacks approach fast on the ridge at first light
ordered_events.quote: Hoofbeats on the ridge — Cossacks, coming fast

ordered_events.detail: Swings into the saddle with dagger drawn, rides out at dawn
ordered_events.quote: He swings into the saddle, dagger already drawn

objects.detail: Already drawn as he mounts

ordered_events.detail: Rides at Hadji Murad's stirrup with the escort
ordered_events.quote: NAZAROV (28) rides at his stirrup

ordered_events.detail: Veers toward the ridge a mile out, draws pistol
ordered_events.quote: A pistol clears the burka

ordered_events.detail: Four escorting Cossacks shot down in three heartbeats
ordered_events.quote: four Cossacks down in the dust

ordered_events.detail: The fifth Cossack rides hard for the watchtower
ordered_events.quote: the fifth bent low over his horse's neck, riding hard

objects.detail: Cleared from the burka, kills four Cossacks

counts.quote: four Cossacks down in the dust
the fifth bent low over his horse's neck
A mile out, Hadji Murad veers toward the ridge

injuries.injury: shot dead by Hadji Murad's pistol
injuries.quote: four Cossacks down in the dust

ordered_events.detail: Turns left toward the flooded rice-fields against instinct
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad turns left

ordered_events.detail: Many horses heard approaching the night camp
ordered_events.quote: horses, many of them

objects.detail: Spread like dark altars on the only dry ground

ordered_events.detail: Six men cut branches and throw earth onto a low bank
ordered_events.quote: Six men cut branches with daggers, throw earth onto a low bank

ordered_events.detail: His surrender call drifts across the shrubs
ordered_events.quote: KARGANOV's (~40) surrender call drifts across the shrubs

objects.detail: Used to cut branches for the earth bank

counts.quote: Six men cut branches with daggers

ordered_events.detail: Reins in twenty paces off with two hundred riders, calls out
ordered_events.quote: reins in twenty paces off, two hundred riders behind him

ordered_events.detail: Lowers rifle, recalls Hadji Aga once ate from his dish
ordered_events.quote: once Hadji Aga ate from his dish

ordered_events.detail: Wedged behind bank, beshmet torn, cotton wool in wound
ordered_events.quote: beshmet torn, blackened cotton wool in the wound

ordered_events.detail: A bullet takes him as he leans past the bank, falls onto Hadji Murad's leg
ordered_events.quote: a bullet takes him; he reels back onto Hadji Murad's leg

ordered_events.detail: Sits hard in dirt, throat ragged, spits red, goes still
ordered_events.quote: throat ragged, spits red, goes still

objects.detail: Passed by Khanefi; he sights without hurry
Last flask set within reach at the bank wall
Drawn as he half-rises and leans past the bank

counts.quote: the road back open for one hour

injuries.injury: gunshot wound packed with blackened cotton wool
injuries.quote: beshmet torn, blackened cotton wool in the wound

injuries.injury: shot dead, falls onto Hadji Murad's leg
injuries.quote: a bullet takes him; he reels back onto Hadji Murad's leg

injuries.injury: throat wound, spits red and dies
injuries.quote: throat ragged, spits red, goes still

ordered_events.detail: Dictates that the dispatch say Hadji Murad fell bravely, refusing surrender
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad fell bravely, surrounded, refusing surrender

ordered_events.detail: Kneels before Shamil with a cloth bundle on the carpet
ordered_events.quote: a courier kneels with a cloth bundle on the carpet

ordered_events.detail: Does not look up, strokes his beard once, turns a Quran page
ordered_events.quote: does not look up, strokes his beard once, turns a page

ordered_events.detail: Presses ear to cold stone, then turns his face to the wall
ordered_events.quote: Yusuf presses his ear to cold stone and listens upward

objects.detail: Read before dictating the official dispatch
Delivered by kneeling courier onto the carpet
Across his knees; he turns a page
Sits beside Yusuf in the pit

ordered_events.detail: Drags himself out, fires pistol once, walks forward on broken leg
ordered_events.quote: walks forward on the broken leg — dagger in hand, straight at the guns

ordered_events.detail: Speaks his son's name once into the open air
ordered_events.quote: speaks his son's name once into the open air

ordered_events.detail: Second volley takes him against a young tree's trunk
ordered_events.quote: before the second volley takes him

ordered_events.detail: Kneels, takes the head with two clean strokes, rolls it away
ordered_events.quote: Two clean strokes, eyes on the middle distance, and the head comes free

ordered_events.detail: Stands bound with Khan Mahoma and Gamzalo, watching
ordered_events.quote: stand bound, watching, naming nothing

ordered_events.detail: Stands bound with Khanefi and Gamzalo, watching
ordered_events.quote: stand bound, watching, naming nothing

ordered_events.detail: Stands bound with Khanefi and Khan Mahoma, watching
ordered_events.quote: stand bound, watching, naming nothing

objects.detail: Fired once as he drags himself from the bank
Two clean strokes take the head free
Rolled away with the side of his foot

counts.what: clean strokes to take the head
counts.quote: Two clean strokes, eyes on the middle distance

injuries.injury: shot by rifles then killed by second volley, decapitated
injuries.quote: blood at his side and shoulder and face

ordered_events.detail: Dismounts in moonlit yard, lifts a heavy linen sack
ordered_events.quote: KAMENEV (~40) dismounts in the moonlit yard

ordered_events.detail: Hauls out the severed head by the shaven skull
ordered_events.quote: He hauls out the head by the shaven skull

ordered_events.detail: Seals Avdeev's death notice packet for the post
ordered_events.quote: a corporal seals a thin packet for the post

ordered_events.detail: Sways toward the head, presses his mouth to the dead forehead
ordered_events.quote: presses his mouth to the dead forehead

objects.detail: Lifted from saddle-bag, holds the severed head
Hauled out by skull, later slid back into canvas by Cossack
Sealed for the post, addressed to a snow-covered village

ordered_events.detail: Steps out onto the porch and reaches for a word
ordered_events.quote: Butler steps out and reaches for a word

ordered_events.detail: Says they are all cut-throats; a head belongs in the earth
ordered_events.quote: They are all cut-throats, she says, flat and final

ordered_events.detail: Stands, descends the last step, walks toward the dark
ordered_events.quote: walks toward the dark without looking back

objects.detail: Carried out, laid across her knees, smoothed once by hand
Bent and bloodied at ditch edge, then upright and flowering
